title: Vacancy for Teacher at BITS Pilani

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at BITS Pilani
jsonLd.description:
BITS Pilani, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BITS Pilani:
BITS Pilani is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani!
